name: smartish-sale
description: Smart contracts for the butane sale

scripts.build: aiken build && bun run generate.ts && prettier -w ./plutus.ts
scripts.build:debug: aiken build -t verbose && bun run generate.ts && prettier -w ./plutus.ts
scripts.metadata: bun run ./src/meta.ts > meta.json && bun x prettier -w meta.json

author: Micah Kendall
